Host Tips
  • Be descriptive: Properties with detailed descriptions get 40% more bookings.
  • Competitive pricing: Set your offer price 10-15% lower than the standard price to attract deals.
  • Images: Once your property is created, you will be prompted to upload high-quality images. Properties with 5+ images perform the best!
